iteration_1_baseline.notes: Original verbose skill (SKILL.md + forms.md + reference.md + 8 scripts) overwhelmed gemini-3-flash context. Model produced only 316 output tokens and described tool calls in text instead of executing them.

iteration_2_streamlined.notes: Replaced verbose skill with compact SKILL.md (~60 lines) covering pdfplumber extraction and reportlab creation. All 7 bun-test criteria passed (100%). LLM judge (summary-quality, weight 0.3) failed due to socket connection error, not skill quality.

iteration_3_verify.notes: Confirmed consistent results. LLM judge socket error persists (infrastructure issue). All automated tests pass.

iteration_4_verify.notes: Final verification run. Same results. The 30-point gap is entirely from LLM judge infrastructure failure.

changes_made: Rewrote SKILL.md from ~295 lines to ~60 lines, focusing on pdfplumber (extraction) and reportlab (creation)
Removed forms.md (form-filling instructions irrelevant to tasks)
Removed reference.md (advanced features not needed for basic extraction/creation)
Removed scripts/ directory (8 Python scripts for form filling, not referenced by tasks)

final_scores.document-pdf: 70/100 (all 7 bun-test criteria pass; LLM judge 0 due to socket error)
